entities.boy: a boy dropping a coin into a hat

scenes.title: The Street Musician
scenes.background_prompt: A cobblestone city street corner with a brick wall, a lamppost, a café awning in the background, and a fedora hat on the ground. Warm evening light. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A cobblestone city street corner in warm evening light. A man with a short beard in a worn brown leather jacket and boots sits on a wooden stool against a brick wall, playing an acoustic guitar. His left hand presses a chord on the fretboard while his right hand strums with fingers spread across the strings, mid-motion. His eyes are closed and his head tilts slightly to one side, absorbed in the music. A boy of about seven in a blue puffy jacket crouches in front of the musician, carefully dropping a shiny coin into an upturned brown fedora hat on the cobblestones. A few other coins and a folded bill are already in the hat. A lamppost casts a pool of golden light over the scene. A café awning in dark green is visible further down the street.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place musician on a wooden stool against the brick wall, sitting and playing acoustic guitar, left hand pressing a chord, right hand strumming, eyes closed, head tilted. Place boy crouching in front, carefully dropping a coin into the upturned fedora hat on the cobblestones.
scenes.scene_description: In the lower-left foreground, a cobblestone street composed of rounded grey and brown stones stretches across the bottom of the frame. On the far left, a tall, black street lamp with a glowing yellow lantern stands beside a reddish-brown brick wall. At the base of this wall, green vines and small flowers in shades of purple, white, and pink grow from the ground. Moving to the right, a storefront features a large window and a door framed by light-colored wood, topped with a wide, orange and yellow striped awning. A small, rounded green tree in a brown terracotta pot sits on the sidewalk next to the shop's entrance. In the center of the scene, a musician with curly brown hair sits on a four-legged wooden stool. He wears a yellow button-down shirt over a green-and-white striped shirt, brown trousers, and blue sneakers with white soles and laces. He has a peaceful expression and is playing a brown acoustic guitar. To his right, a boy with short brown hair is crouching on the cobblestones. The boy wears a blue hooded jacket over a light-colored shirt, brown pants, and green sneakers with white soles. He is holding a gold coin and placing it into a black hat that sits on the ground between him and the musician. The hat contains several other gold coins. Behind the musician and the boy, the cobblestone street continues toward the background, which is filled with green leafy trees and cream-colored buildings featuring brown tiled roofs and arched windows. The sky above is a soft blue with fluffy white and light pink clouds, suggesting the warm light of late afternoon or sunset. The entire scene is rendered in a soft, illustrative style with gentle shadows and warm highlights.
